The Merry Swan Tavern is on the southern end of the Third Circle. Imadan has some of the Beren's Blood wine Forlong wants. You should gather some your…
The Merry Swan Tavern is on the southern end of the Third Circle. Bring the wine back over to Forlong's table.
The Merry Swan Tavern is on the southern end of the Third Circle. Hear to what Neldir has to say.
The Merry Swan Tavern is on the southern end of the Third Circle. Find some of the Old Calembel cheese that Forlong and his friends used to eat with t…
The Middle Stores are in south part of the Third Circle. Imadan has no Old Calembel cheese, but thinks the back reaches of the Middle Stores might hav…
The Middle Stores are in south part of the Third Circle. They have some Old Calembel deep at the back of the Middle Stores. You should gather some for…
The Merry Swan Tavern is on the southern end of the Third Circle. Bring the cheese back to the Merry Swan.
The Merry Swan Tavern is on the southern end of the Third Circle. Forlong, Hirluin, and Neldir have tasted the Old Calembel. See how they liked it.
The Merry Swan Tavern is on the southern end of the Third Circle. Hear what Forlong has to say.
The Merry Swan Tavern is on the southern end of the Third Circle. Hear what Hirluin has to say.
The Merry Swan Tavern is on the southern end of the Third Circle. Listen to Forlong's reply.
The Merry Swan Tavern is on the southern end of the Third Circle. Hear what Hirluin has to say.
Forlong claims the mark can be found in the Third Circle, just north of the Pier. Look for a mark on the column where the old Master of the Burg swung…
The Merry Swan Tavern is on the southern end of the Third Circle. Return to the Merry Swan and tell Hirluin the mark can, in fact, be seen.
The Merry Swan Tavern is on the southern end of the Third Circle. Listen to Forlong continue his tale.
The Merry Swan Tavern is on the southern end of the Third Circle. Listen to Neldir's interjection.
Search for these things in the Third Circle of Minas Tirith. Look for a hat, some bread, some flowers, and a small rug to help prove Neldir's point.
The Merry Swan Tavern is on the southern end of the Third Circle. Bring the things you have gathered back to Neldir, in the Merry Swan.
The Merry Swan Tavern is on the southern end of the Third Circle. Try to carry the pile of things across the room.
The Merry Swan Tavern is on the southern end of the Third Circle. Hear what Neldir has to say.
The Merry Swan Tavern is on the southern end of the Third Circle. Listen to Forlong's reply.
The Merry Swan Tavern is on the southern end of the Third Circle. Hear what Hirluin has to say.
The Merry Swan Tavern is on the southern end of the Third Circle. Hear what Forlong has to say.
Go up to the Fourth Circle and see if anyone knows what became of the minstrel Authlin.
The Merry Swan Tavern is on the southern end of the Third Circle. You have learned what became of Authlin, Master Minstrel. Now you should return to F…
Forlong and his friends are in the Merry Swan, in the Third Circle of Minas Tirith. Drink with Forlong and company.
The Merry Swan Tavern is on the southern end of the Third Circle. Hear what Forlong has to say.
Authlin's favourite spot was across from the Artists' Fellow-hall in the Fourth Circle. Place the empty bottle of Beren's Blood at Authlin's favourite…
